task_completion.description: Create the first Job Title specified in the hiring plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Senior Biomass Process Engineer' successfully added to the Job Titles list or configuration screen within the Talent Acquisition module.

task_completion.description: Create the second Job Title specified in the hiring plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Field Safety Inspector' successfully added to the Job Titles list or configuration screen within the Talent Acquisition module.

task_completion.description: Standardize the Interview Rounds pipeline with the three specified rounds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an interview pipeline or settings screen displaying exactly these three rounds: 'Initial Phone Screen', 'Technical Plant Assessment', and 'Plant Manager Interview'.

task_completion.description: Open the first multi-headcount Job Requisition linked to the new title and department.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an active/open Job Requisition in the system for the title 'Senior Biomass Process Engineer', assigned to the 'Engineering' department, showing a headcount or positions count of 2.

task_completion.description: Open the second multi-headcount Job Requisition linked to the new title and department.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an active/open Job Requisition in the system for the title 'Field Safety Inspector', assigned to the 'Quality Assurance' department, showing a headcount or positions count of 3.

integrity.description: Agent used the Talent Acquisition application GUI to perform the configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the screenshots show interaction with a genuine HR/Talent Acquisition software interface, rather than a text editor or database viewer.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that there are no terminal windows showing database injection commands (e.g., sqlite3, curl, python scripts) used to create the titles, rounds, or requisitions.

integrity.description: Changes were actually saved or submitted in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the configurations (titles, rounds, requisitions) appear in a saved state or list view, not just typed into an unsubmitted form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Job Titles: 'Senior Biomass Process Engineer' and 'Field Safety Inspector'. Expected Interview Rounds: 'Initial Phone Screen', 'Technical Plant Assessment', and 'Plant Manager Interview'. Requisition 1 must be for 'Senior Biomass Process Engineer' in 'Engineering' with 2 positions. Requisition 2 must be for 'Field Safety Inspector' in 'Quality Assurance' with 3 positions.
